item.arcane-relics.lightning_wand.info.2: Hold use to build charge strength for more damage.
item.arcane-relics.lightning_wand.info.3: A full charge causes a block-breaking explosion.
item.arcane-relics.lightning_wand.info.4: Sneak-use with a blaze rod or near a lightning rod to recharge.
